title: Minestuck Extras
description: Adds new blocks, weapons, foods, and armor sets to Minestuck.
body:
**Features:**

**Aspect Armor Sets** - An armor set that can be crafted using materials found in the Medium. Comes in 12 colors, one for each aspect. This armor is an upgrade to Netherite Armor and has superior stats compared to Netherite.

**Obtainable Caledfwlch** - Adds a structure to Heat lands where the player can find Caledfwlch. [Unobtainable in base Minestuck]

**Obtainable Fluorite Octet** - The Fluorite Octet can now be crafted and used, throwing 8 dice that inflict randomized effects upon hitting entities.

**Obtainable Zilly Weapons** - In the medium, you can find ruins filled with suspicious gravel that can be brushed for Punched Cards which have the code for all of the zilly weapons. (Compatible with Alchemy Expanded)

**More Food** - Expands the number of edible insects and alchemizable food items, including marshmallows, pizza, and chocolate milk.

**Building Blocks** - Adds stone block sets for each aspect, to match the aspect wood in base Minestuck. Also adds the Bramble wood set from Hivecraft.

**Readable Books** - Minestuck's books can now be read for flavor text, and can be placed into chiseled bookshelves. Cruxite Dowels can also be placed into chiseled bookshelves.

**Welsh & Zilly weapons buffed** - Zilly and Welsh weapons now inflict a debuff. (Compatible with Alchemy Expanded) These debuffs inflict (level x 5%) of the victim's current hp as damage. 

**Cherub Ruins** - Rare structures will spawn in the medium, containing suspicious gravel blocks that can be brushed for exclusive items.

**Trickster Mode** - Obtaining a small amount of Zillium from putting certain items into a Gristwidget will allow you to alchemize the Red and Green lollipops. Hold one in each hand to obtain the Swirly Lollipop. You know what to do.

**Prankster's Gambit** - Dealing critical damage will grant you 1 point of PG, up to a maximum of 10. If the target is a player, they will lose 1 point. Pressing the Prankster's Gambit keybind will convert your PG into a temporary damage buff. The damage is equal to your PG when pressing the keybind, and the duration is 1 minute, minus 5 seconds per point of PG.

**New Weapons** - Adds roughly 20 new weapons. A brief summary of the more unique ones:

_Throwing Knife: Alchemized with Dagger && Shuriken. Can be compacted to throw 4 at once_

_Stereo Buster: Prevents friendly fire between other players wielding the same weapon. Right click a player with the same weapon to gain a temporary damage boost._

_Anima Sola: Inflicts Wither and lights targets on fire. Never inflicts knockback_

_Harvest Sword: Guarantees mob head/skull drops_

_Byrllysg: Upgrade of the vanilla Mace, functions similarly_

_Resonance Pillar: Critical Hits are much stronger_

_Zenith: Launches sword beams that pierce enemies and inflict both zilly and welsh debuffs_

[REQUIRES MINESTUCK](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck)

[INTENDED TO BE USED WITH BETTER COMBAT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus)
